$comment: Phase 14 (ISD §14.G) — performance budgets enforced in CI (Phase 16). Each value is the hard ceiling per route. The CI gate fails the build if any route exceeds its budget.

firstLoadJsPerRoute.$comment: Total first-load JS shipped to the client (parsed + executed) for each route, including the shared chunks. Values are in KB.

totalShellSize.$comment: Sum of all precached app-shell assets (chunks + manifest + icons + manifest.webmanifest).

webVitals.$comment: Core Web Vitals targets, measured on key routes under simulated mid-tier mobile. CI gates the build when a route regresses by more than 10% vs the target.

readerInteraction.$comment: Reader-specific performance budget. Page-turn latency is measured on a mid-tier device; exceeding this triggers a regression alert (not a build failure).

queries.$comment: Database-side performance budgets. Enforced indirectly: CI runs EXPLAIN on the hot queries; a sequential scan on a 1000-row table fails the gate.

rls.$comment: RLS-related performance budgets. Indexes used by RLS predicates must exist (verified by EXPLAIN).
